evals.name: classify_system
evals.prompt: Analyze a microservices architecture with shared message queues and tight deployment coupling using Perrow's framework
assertions: Response should classify the system on the I/C chart
Response should assess both interactive complexity and tight coupling
Response should mention the Normal Accident Theory

evals.name: incident_diagnosis
evals.prompt: We had a cascading failure in our payment system. A database failover caused cache invalidation which triggered a retry storm. Use DEPOSE to analyze this.
assertions: Response should apply all six DEPOSE categories
Response should identify interacting failures vs independent ones
Response should not stop at operator error
